user.title: Position Tracker
user.description: Name the device that groups your tracked covers (e.g., "Theater Bed Position").

add_cover.title: Add tracked angle
add_cover.description: Pick a source cover to wrap with angle tracking. The maximum angle is the bed motor's mechanical range in degrees (e.g., 65° for back, 45° for legs on most beds). "Presses to full travel" is how many open-cover presses move it from 0° to that maximum. A number entity will be created exposing 0 to max° as a slider.

data.name: Display name (e.g., Back Angle, Legs Angle)

menu.title: Tracked angles
menu.description:
{count} configured: {names}

Add another tracked angle or finish setup.

error.not_a_cover: Source must be a cover entity.
error.duplicate_source: This source cover is already being tracked.

init.title: Calibration
init.description:
Adjust the press-to-full-travel calibration for each tracked cover.

{covers}

set_position.name: Sync position
set_position.description: Manually set a tracked angle to a known value (in degrees).

entity_id.name: Tracked angle
entity_id.description: The position_tracker number entity to sync.

position.name: Angle
position.description: The known angle in degrees (0 = fully flat).
